title: Product UX remediation verdict update after playable slice
summary: Update readiness evidence after the new playable-product slice, explicitly distinguishing demo/control-test readiness from public release or EA readiness.
acceptance: Verdict update records which Owner product-UX blockers are resolved, partially resolved or still blocking
Readiness evidence explicitly distinguishes controlled internal/demo review from public release, EA, store or signed distribution readiness
Web demo-only and Windows unsigned controlled-test verdicts remain unchanged unless a separate Owner-approved task changes them
Report records whether a future public-readiness audit is possible and what still requires Owner approval
No public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility action is created or executed
forbiddenPaths: telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval
